title: Consultation - Revised Monograph (Acne Therapy) - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation - Revised Monograph (Acne Therapy)
Notice to the reader: The online consultation is now closed.  Comments and suggestions received during the public consultation period are  being considered. Thank you for your input.
The Natural and Non-prescription Health Products Directorate (NNHPD) is seeking your feedback on the revised monograph (Acne Therapy) .
This consultation is open for comment for the period of January 26 to March 25, 2016 .
For any comments being submitted, it is requested that references to applicable scientific literature be included for verification purposes.
Visit our " Contact Us " page.

## Reporting to Canadians
All comments received during the consultation period will be considered prior to finalizing the monograph. Once finalized, the final Acne Therapy Monograph will be available on the Health Canada website.
As always, companies can choose to comply with the monograph or apply outside the scope of this document by providing additional evidence to support the safety and efficacy of their products.
